programme.title: Fast N Loud: Specials
programme.desc: For bileksperten Richard Rawlings og mestermekanikeren Aaron Kaufman er gamle biler en potentielt guldgrube, og sammen rejser de landet rundt for at finde sjældne biler, som de kan sætte i stand og sælge videre på auktioner!

programme.title: Ghost Adventures
programme.desc: Det frygtløse hold bag Ghost Adventures er tilbage! I hver episode rejser spøgelsesjægerne Zak Bagans og Aaron Goodwin sammen med teknikerne Billy Tolley og Jay Wasley til en hjemsøgt destination, hvor de mødes med lokale, øjenvidner og eksperter for at undersøge spøgelseshistorierne fra hvert sted. Ved hjælp af den nyeste, videnskabelige teknologi og gadgets sætter holdet deres efterforskning i gang om natten, hvor de konfronterer den paranormale aktivitet og dokumenterer beviserne i håbet om at afdække sandheden bag hvert af de hjemsøgende mysterier.

programme.title: Gold Rush - Specials
programme.desc: Tag med Hoffman-holdet, når de vender tilbage til Alaskas iskolde vildmark for at fortsætte deres desperate jagt på guld. I mere end to år har de uerfarne minearbejdere kæmpet mod defekt udstyr, interne stridigheder og Moder Naturs udfordringer i deres jagt på lykkens gudinde, som kan ændre deres liv for altid. Bliver det en succes - eller vil presset for at nå deres mål drive en kile ned mellem holdene?

programme.title: Little Giants
programme.desc: Kevin er træner for lilleputfodboldholdet Cowboys. Da han afviser at lade sin niece komme med på holdet ­- hun er jo en pige - overtaler hun sin far til at danne sit eget hold, Little Giants, hvor hun kan være med. Holdet består af de værst tænkelige spillere, men de vil tage kampen op mod Cowboys.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Tanked dumber seerne ned i de mest spændende akvarier. Acrylic Tank Manufacturing, ATM er verdensmestre i akvarier! De har kreeret de mest banebrydende og ekstraordinære akvarier. Kunderne er krævende og lokationen nogle gange ligeså. Holdet rejser landet rundt for at bringe havet i øjenhøjde på gæster, som besøger så forskellige steder, som casinoer, kirker, museer og zoologiske haver.

programme.title: Great Continental Railway Journeys
programme.desc: One of the most famous bibliographic references of all time, George Bradshaws Guide to the Continental Railway, serves as the guidebook for this documentary series. A total of five episodes will showcase the different European routes covered in this guide, published in 1913, which marked a turning point for British tourists during the Edwardian era. Gleaming cosmopolitan cities, alpine landscapes, warm, sparkling seas, and picturesque villages are some of the places Bradshaw describes in his book, known precisely for sparking an interest among English citizens in the exoticism of foreign travel.

programme.title: The Great Intelligence Test
programme.desc: The Great British Intelligence Test measures the brainpower of the nation in one of the largest intelligence experiments of its kind.

programme.title: Life Below Zero

This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.desc: Ben Fogle journeys across the globe to meet individuals who have abandoned the pressures of modern life in favor of simpler, more self-sufficient living. Guided by Chris, the project helps them communicate thoughts and emotions they’ve struggled to share, offering their families and friends a deeper understanding of their world—and revealing the rich, complex lives often hidden beneath the surface.

programme.title: Boxing Day Tsunami
programme.desc: Follow the path of the most devastating tsunami on record, whose deadly ripple effects would be felt across the globe. First came an earthquake deep below the Indian Ocean. Minutes later, in the early hours of Boxing Day 2004, a 100-foot wall of water ripped through Indonesia. Then the tsunami reached Thailand, leaving unimaginable devastation in its wake.

programme.title: Joanna Lumleys Spice Trail Adventure
programme.desc: Actress Joanna Lumley traces the ancient spice trail from Indonesia to the Middle East. The journey begins in the Banda Islands, famous for nutmeg, progresses in search of pepper to southern India and continues to the "vanilla coast" of Madagascar. In Zanzibar, Lumley learns about the sad side of the spice trade. The journey ends in the ruined city of Petra in Jordan. (Joanna Lumleys Spice trail adventure, Britannia, 2023).

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Deep in Alaska, the primal way lives on. Fight the freeze, brave the wild, hold on to your sanity. And winter is no wonderland when temperatures plummet far below zero. This series follows the drama and hardships experienced by Alaskan households in different corners of this merciless territory as they battle to survive, thrive, and live life on their own terms.

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 hours in...
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade and guests deliver the definitive guide to a weekend away in some of the world’s most amazing destinations. Accompanied by some of the funniest performers from screen and stage Travel Mangives the low down on famous attractions and obscure delights.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Airing since 1979, the British series travels the country (with occasional trips to other countries, such as Canada and Australia), bringing together in each location specialists in antiques and fine arts to have them appraise items brought in by local residents, whether they are collectors looking to turn trash into treasure or ordinary folks hoping Grandmas old painting might now fund the kids education. Items featured on the show often have an interesting story attached to them or have some connection to that episodes venue. While some items that are brought in are worth a fortune, others are worthless.

programme.title: The Weakest Link Celebrity Specials
programme.desc: Comedian Romesh Ranganathan takes charge of the back-stabbing, big money, game show. Can the contestants create a chain of answers and avoid being the weakest link?

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: Twelve homebakers take part in a bake off, which will test every aspect of their baking skills as they battle it out to be crowned the Great British Bake Offs Best Amateur Baker. Each episode tests different aspects of their baking skills through a signature bake, a technical challenge, and a showstopper.

programme.title: Shakespeare and Hathaway: Private Investigators
programme.desc: In the historic town of Stratford-upon-Avon, eccentric private detectives Luella Shakespeare and Frank Hathaway join forces to crack curious cases and outsmart criminals. With Luella’s intuition and Frank’s street-smart instincts, this unconventional duo tackles mysteries filled with twists, humour, and intrigue, proving that opposites really do make the best crime-solvers.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: The irreverent BAFTA award-winning chat show hosted by Graham Norton. Each episode is brim full of chat, comedy, celebrity gossip and hilarious absurdities. Theres just enough risque material to make viewers and guests cringe with delight and at the end of each episode, Graham introduces some of the best contemporary music acts to wrap things up and finish the show off with a bang.

programme.title: QI
programme.desc: QI is a quiz show packed with quirky and surprising facts where contestants are rewarded not just for correct answers but for responses that are “quite interesting.” The show blends humor, curiosity, and clever banter, encouraging players to think outside the box. Its unique format creates an entertaining and unpredictable experience that celebrates knowledge in all its curious forms.

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Award-winning comedy panel show where contestants have to bluff about their deepest secrets and the opposing team must decipher which ones are true.

programme.title: 8 Out Of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Hosted by the ever-witty Jimmy Carr, the stars of 8 Out of 10 Cats team up with celebrity guests to take on the iconic words and numbers game show. Packed with comedy, cleverness, and chaos, this hilarious spin on the classic quiz brings together quick-thinking, laughs, and unpredictable moments. With comedians battling brains and banter, it’s a uniquely entertaining twist that blends panel show fun with the challenge of Countdown.

programme.title: Livet under null
programme.desc: Serie som følger vanskelighetene som fire husstander i Alaska opplever i forskjellige hjørner av dette nådeløse territoriet mens de kjemper for å komme seg gjennom en lang, mørk, iskald vinter. Den enorme amerikanske delstaten Alaska kan skryte av noe av verdens mest dødelige vær, med temperaturer som jevnlig stuper til dødelige -80 Fahrenheit, og fryser utsatte lemmer på minutter. Likevel er det også hjemsted for noen av de tøffeste, mest motstandsdyktige og mest isolerte menneskene i verden. Livet handler om å overleve i møte med ubøyelig vær, knappe ressurser og menneskeetende rovdyr.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven Universe is about the misadventures of a boy named Steven, the ultimate "little brother" to a team of magical guardians of humanity—the Crystal Gems. Steven may not be as powerful as the Crystal Gems. Or as savvy. But that doesnt stop him from joining Garnet, Amethyst and Pearl on their magical adventures and somehow finding a way to save the day!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.title: Bunnicula
programme.desc: Bunnicula is an animated comedy series based on the bestselling childrens book of the same name. The series features the paranormal comedy adventures of Bunnicula the vampire rabbit, Chester the paranoid cat, and Harold the loyal family dog. Together, our heroes protect their owner Mina and the city of New Orleans from spooky supernatural creatures… including Bunnicula himself!

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. programme.title: Dexters Laboratory
programme.desc: Meet Dexter, half Einstein and half third-grader. This boy genius creates awesome inventions in a space-age lab attached to his room, but no genius is without trouble! Dexters space-brained sister, Dee Dee, is always messing up his work, and his dorky rival, Mandark, is constantly trying to one-up him. Time to fight fire with — science!

programme.title: Adventure Time

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven Universe is about the misadventures of a boy named Steven, the ultimate "little brother" to a team of magical guardians of humanity—the Crystal Gems. Steven may not be as powerful as the Crystal Gems. Or as savvy. But that doesnt stop him from joining Garnet, Amethyst and Pearl on their magical adventures and somehow finding a way to save the day!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

His dad is a 6’4” bunny. His mom works at a Rainbow Factory. And his brother is a goldfish named Darwin. Yup, everything looks perfectly normal.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: From Warner Bros. Animation, these teen titans are on the go! Right after they make a sandwich or play some video games. Wait, theres laundry to do? ("Not it!") After that, theyll definitely go fight some crime. Maybe. Dont miss the return of Robin, Starfire, Raven, Beast Boy and Cyborg - teen super heroes who are totally unsupervised!.

programme.title: Looney Tunes Cartoons
programme.desc: Folks, have ya heard? Your favorite Looney Tunes characters are back! Featuring updated stories and everyone’s favorite characters, these all-new animated episodes revitalize the iconic series known and loved for decades. Back to their old tricks are Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck, Porky Pig, and other marquee Looney Tunes characters who promise to delight audiences young and old with their zany adventures, slapstick comedy, and madcap energy. Get ready to have some fun – that’s all, folks!

programme.desc: Tiny Toons Looniversity follows Babs and Buster Bunny, Sweetie Bird, Hamton J. Pig, and Plucky Duck as they learn what it takes to be a professional toon under the tutelage of Bugs Bunny, Daffy Duck and other looney legends.

programme.title: Regular Show
programme.desc: Mordecai – a sarcastic blue jay, and Rigby – a somewhat responsible raccoon, are best friends. They even work together at a park owned by Pops, a big lollipop-headed guy. Which seems normal enough. They’ve got a cranky gumball machine for a boss and they work alongside a Zen-like yeti named Skips. Yep. Everything is as regular as can be.

programme.title: Adventure Time
programme.desc: Its one crazy adventure after another for human boy, Finn, and his best friend, Jake, a 28-year old dog with magical powers. Theyre out to have the most fun possible and they sure do find it exploring the Land of Ooo! Whether its saving Princess Bubblegum, battling zombie candy, taunting the Ice King or rocking out with Marceline the Vampire Queen, with Finn and Jake its always ADVENTURE TIME!

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: Steven Universe is about the misadventures of a boy named Steven, the ultimate "little brother" to a team of magical guardians of humanity—the Crystal Gems. Steven may not be as powerful as the Crystal Gems. Or as savvy. But that doesnt stop him from joining Garnet, Amethyst and Pearl on their magical adventures and somehow finding a way to save the day!

programme.title: Jade Armor
programme.desc: The mystical Jade Armor is a legendary superhero. And now, it is Lan Jun’s turn to be Jade Armor. Even she can’t quite believe her destiny is to be this epic hero! With the help of her friends, Theo and Alisha and the mystical Beasticons that accompany the Armor, Lan Jun is thrust into a series of action-packed adventures. Each day, she must contend with both an evil array of super villains and the very real trials of teenage life.

programme.title: The Heroic Quest of the Valiant Prince Ivandoe
programme.desc: The series follows the adventures of Ivandoe, the young prince of the forest who is on a quest for the magical Golden Feather of the fearsome Eagle King. Ivandoe and his dedicated squire, a small bird named Bert discover new and mysterious areas of the forest and an array of peculiar creatures along the way.

programme.title: Totally Spies!
programme.desc: Three teenage girls from Beverly Hills attempt to balance their lives as students with their undercover work as super-spies for an elite international agency, battling an array of bizarre criminals.

programme.title: Steven Universe
programme.desc: En gruppe magiske voktere, Crystal Gems, lærer en gutt som er en krysning av menneske og Gem, å bruke kreftene sine til å hjelpe dem med å beskytte menneskeheten.

programme.title: Gumballs vidunderlig ville verden
programme.desc: Velkommen tilbake til Elmore, der virkelighetens lover er en vits og familielivet består av ville historier, gøyale vendinger og surrealistisk humor.

programme.title: CNBC Explains
programme.desc: ‘CNBC Explains’ is a dynamic explainer series that dives deep into the forces shaping our world. Each episode unpacks complex business and economic topics, breaking them down into clear, compelling narratives. With expert insights, data-driven visuals and a global perspective, this series helps viewers understand not just what is happening, but why it matters.

programme.title: Leaders Playbook
programme.desc: Leader’s Playbook” is an in-depth series that features exclusive, candid interviews with America’s top CEOs and explores the leadership philosophies and the strategic and personal decisions that have shaped today’s most influential companies. Hosted by CNBC’s Senior Media and Tech Correspondent Julia Boorstin, each episode offers a rare glimpse into the mindset of visionary leaders, revealing how they navigate challenges, drive innovation, and build success.

programme.title: Built For Billions
programme.desc: "Built for Billions" uncovers the blueprints behind the world’s biggest tech empires—how they scale, monetize, and dominate markets. From innovative revenue models to dramatic turnarounds, each episode reveals lessons in resilience, leadership, and reinvention that power profitability in the digital age.

programme.title: The Tech Download
programme.desc: Hosted by Arjun Kharpal and Steve Kovach, CNBC’s The Tech Download cuts through the noise to unpack the days biggest stories. They provide expert analysis on the trends, risks, and innovations shaping our world—and your money.

programme.title: American Greed
programme.desc: “American Greed” goes inside the dark side of the American Dream - where money seduces, power corrupts, and smooth criminals will stop at nothing to get rich. Their complex scams leave victims lives in shambles. Each episode is a deep dive into the minds and actions of heartless crooks who live lives most people can only dream of.

programme.title: Europe Early Edition

programme.title: Squawk Box Europe
programme.desc: CNBCs flagship show in Europe sets you up with everything you need to know for the European business day. programme.title: Nord bei Nordwest
programme.desc: Der ehemalige Hamburger Polizist Hauke Jacobs mochte im Ostsee-Stadtchen Schwanitz als Tierarzt neu anfangen. Doch immer wieder kommen ihm mysteriose Verbrechen dazwischen.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Der Beschutzer - Wissen, das totet
programme.desc: Mit einem Mord bei einem Energie-Startup beginnt ein schwieriger Auftrag fur den BKA-Personenschutzer Jan Schafer: Auslandische Agenten erschieSSen den Grunder Julian Raabe bei dem Versuch, streng geheime Daten zu erhalten. Sein Geschaftspartner und Bruder Eduard entkommt, befindet sich aber in hochster Gefahr. Denn seine Forschungsergebnisse, die Wasserstoff als Energietrager profitabel machen, wurden die Weltwirtschaft ebenso wie die Sicherheitspolitik verandern. Entgegen des Rates der Firmenanwaltin will Eduard nicht klein beigeben. Schafer und seine Kollegin Freuding erhalten daher den Auftrag, ihn und seine Familie zu schutzen.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Mein Altweibersommer
programme.desc: Ebba Bornkamp, eine Frau in den Lebensjahren, die man wohlwollend die besten nennt, erlebt einen verstorend realistischen Traum, genauer gesagt, einen Albtraum: Sie bringt ein Barenjunges zur Welt! Wenige Tage spater reist sie mit ihrem Mann Markus zu Freunden an die Ostsee. Als Ebba bei einem Spaziergang am Strand zufallig auf einen kleinen Wanderzirkus trifft, holt der Traum die erfolgreiche Geschaftsfrau ein - anders, aber nicht minder ungewohnlich.

programme.title: Brisant
programme.desc: Traume und Tragodien, menschliche und tierische Schicksale liefern den Stoff fur Brisant, das tagliche Boulevard-Magazin der ARD. Eine Mischung aus Information und Unterhaltung: schnell, spannend.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Die Tierarzte - Retter mit Herz
programme.desc: Was passiert hinter den Turen und in den OPs der Tierarztpraxen von Sylt bis Starnberg? Die Serie "Die Tierarzte – Retter mit Herz" zeigt mutige Alltagshelden im Einsatz: Sie behandeln verschluckte Nadeln, gerissene Bander und vieles mehr.

programme.title: TickTack Zeitreise mit Lisa and Lena
programme.desc: Langeweile und endlose Ausfuhrungen wie im Geschichtsunterricht? Fehlanzeige! Bei "TickTack Zeitreise mit Lisa and Lena" nehmen die beiden euch mit auf eine temporeiche, spannende und oft sehr lustige Entdeckungsreise in die Vergangenheit - die Themen reichen von Fotografie uber Gleichberechtigung bis hin zu Mode, Raumfahrt oder Operationen.

programme.title: Shaun das Schaf
programme.desc: Gemeinsam mit seiner Herde lebt Shaun das Schaf auf der Weide eines schon gelegenen Bauernhofs. Shaun ist jung, noch etwas naiv und unerfahren. Doch er verfugt uber einen ausgesprochenen "Schaf-Sinn", denn Shaun das Schaf ist ein besonderes Schaf.

programme.title: Tigerenten Club
programme.desc: Zwei Schulklassen treten jeweils als Tigerenten- und Froscheteam zusammen mit ihren Lehrern in Spielen gegeneinander an. Das Verliererteam schickt seinen Lehrer am Ende des Spiels baden, die Gewinnerklasse erhalt auSSerdem Sachpreise.

programme.title: MausBlick
programme.desc: Mit dieser Frage von Max und Paul beschaftigt sich Theresa im aktuellen MausBlick.

programme.title: Nils Holgerssons wunderbare Reise
programme.desc: Der 13-jahrige Nils ist nicht besonders glucklich: Standig muss er auf dem Bauernhof seiner Eltern in Schonen helfen, dabei ginge er viel lieber mit dem Vater auf die Fuchsjagd. Doch der wird ihn nicht mitnehmen, denn Nils hat vergessen, die Milch auszutragen - und uberhaupt sind seine Eltern der Meinung, er sei faul, habe keinen Respekt vor den Tieren und viel Unsinn im Kopf.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Im Mittelpunkt der Serie RACKO - Ein Hund fur alle Falle steht der 12-jahrige Flori, der von seinem GroSSvater einen Bauernhof erbt.

programme.title: Racko - Ein Hund fur alle Falle
programme.desc: Im Mittelpunkt der Serie RACKO - Ein Hund fur alle Falle steht der 12-jahrige Flori, der von seinem GroSSvater einen Bauernhof erbt.

programme.title: Die Sendung mit der Maus
programme.desc: Lach- und Sachgeschichten, Slapstick mit Oskar, Armins verrucktem Fruhstuck, einem Tanzwettbewerb auf der Farm – und naturlich mit der Maus, dem Elefanten und der Ente.

programme.title: Tagesschau

programme.title: Des Kaisers neue Kleider
programme.desc: Kaiser Friedhelm, der Fesche, hat bald Geburtstag und nichts anzuziehen. Dabei gibt er sagenhafte Reichtumer fur seine Garderobe aus. Doch ihn langweilen all die prachtigen Roben. Ein ausgefallenes Gewand zum Fest muss her, koste es, was es wolle.

programme.title: Der gestiefelte Kater
programme.desc: Anders als seine zwei Bruder traumt Hans, der jungste Sohn des alten Mullers, von der groSSen Liebe und vom Gluck auf Erden. Als Hans Vater stirbt, vermacht er dem Ersten Bruder die Muhle, dem Zweiten den Esel und Hans aber nur den Kater Minkus. Hans ist gekrankt uber diese scheinbare Ungerechtigkeit und beschlieSSt trotzig, sich aus dem Katzenfell ein Paar Pelzhandschuhe machen zu lassen. Doch er bringt es nicht ubers Herz. Aus Dank fangt Minkus an zu reden und verspricht Hans, dass er alle seine Traume wahr machen werde - und eines der schonsten Marchen der Gebruder Grimm beginnt.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Presseclub
programme.desc: Im ARD-Presseclub diskutieren Journalistinnen und Journalisten aus dem In- und Ausland aktuelle politische Ereignisse und Entwicklungen. Im Dialog entsteht ein Wettstreit der Meinungen und Interpretationen aktueller politischer Vorgange. Durch die Sendungen fuhren im Wechsel Volker Herres, Jorg Schonenborn und Sonia Seymour Mikich. Im anschlieSSenden "Presseclub nachgefragt" konnen Zuschauerinnen und Zuschauer uber die WDR 5 Hotline mit den Beteiligten der Sendung weiterdiskutieren und Fragen stellen.

programme.title: Europamagazin
programme.desc: SWR und WDR prasentieren das Europamagazin im Ersten im wochentlichen Wechsel das Neueste von der EU in Brussel und aus unseren Nachbarlandern: Sonntagmittag, gleich nach dem Presseclub.

programme.title: Nashorner - Mit Herz und Horn
programme.desc: Nashorner sind Familientiere. Der Film zeigt die enge Bindung zwischen einer Mutter und ihrem Sohn. Er weicht ihr mehrere Jahre nicht von der Seite, doch dann andert sich plotzlich alles fur ihn: Seine Mutter ist wieder trachtig und wird ihn verstoSSen. Erstmalig konnte die Geburt eines Nashornbabys in freier Wildbahn gefilmt werden. Der Zuschauer ist hautnah dabei, wenn der Kleine seine ersten tapsigen Schritte macht. Ein intimes Portrat dieser charismatischen Tiere.

programme.title: Feuer and Flamme
programme.desc: Die Doku begleitet sie bei Brandeinsatzen, technischen Hilfen, Tauchaktionen im Neckar und Rettungen im Odenwald – emotional und hautnah. Mit Bodycams erleben Zuschauer den Alltag der Feuerwehr, auch abseits der Einsatze, inklusive kulinarischer Vorlieben.

programme.title: Todlicher Himalaya
programme.desc: Die Extrembergsteiger Benedikt Bohm und Sebastian Haag verbindet eine tiefe Freundschaft, bis es bei einer gemeinsamen Expedition im Himalaya 2014 zu einem tragischen Ungluck kommt. Kurz vor dem Gipfel geraten Sebastian und zwei weitere Expeditionsmitglieder in eine Lawine. Benedikt muss hilflos dabei zusehen, wie sein bester Freund in den Tod gerissen wird.

programme.title: Tagesschau
programme.desc: Die "Tageschau" bietet die wichtigsten Nachrichten des Tages und zusatzliche Informationen in Text, Bild, Audio und Video sowie umfassende Berichte und Hintergrunde zu aktuellen Themen und Entwicklungen.

programme.title: Vanished - Vertraust du ihm
programme.desc: Alice (Kaley Cuoco) ist nun nicht mehr nur Jagerin, sondern auch Gejagte! Sie kann niemandem vertrauen – weder Toms Umfeld noch Polizeichef Drax (Simon Abkarian). Was die Journalistin Helène (Karin Viard) uber Tom und seine Organisation ans Licht bringt, trifft Alice tief. Ihr bleibt keine andere Wahl, als die Suche fortzusetzen – um nicht selbst unterzugehen. Als sie Alex (Matthias Schweighofer) heimlich folgt, fuhrt er sie zu einer schmerzhaften Wahrheit.

programme.title: Vanished - Vertraust du ihm
programme.desc: Alice (Kaley Cuoco) und Helène (Karin Viard) werden auf dem Container-Terminal von einer Schleuserbande gejagt. Es geht nun nicht mehr nur um das Leben der Gefluchteten, sondern auch um ihr eigenes! Als sie in die Hande der Gangster geraten, bietet sich fur Alice die Chance zur Flucht. Sie weiSS: Weder ihr Geliebter Tom (Sam Claflin) noch sein Freund Alex (Matthias Schweighofer) noch Polizeichef Drax (Simon Abkarian) sind das, was sie zu sein scheinen. Um die Wahrheit herauszufinden, muss sie alles auf eine Karte setzen.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: The very latest developments in business-related news are broadcasted with up-to-date commentary from Berlin-based correspondents, who also discuss recent occurrences from the stock market-exchange in Frankfurt, Germany.

programme.title: REV Mercedes: Iconic German brand or three-pointed fallen star?
programme.desc: Pummeled by Trump’s tariffs and fierce competition in China, Mercedes-Benzs operating profits plunged in 2025. Why is its CEO upbeat? Plus: How e-bikes are making Ugandans life easier and test driving Kia’s PV5.

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: This trip is no joyful nudist holiday, and the protagonists of this documentary series simply dont have time to feel ashamed about their lack of clothing. They have much bigger problems to contend with. This is a matter of sheer survival! Randomly paired couples who have never met before must survive 21 days in the most inhospitable regions of the world – without equipment or food supplies. Due to the dangers they face on these survival trips, the lack of clothing quickly becomes a minor issue. On the Yucatán Peninsula, in the jungles of Nicaragua, and in the Smoky Mountains, entirely different things take priority. Here, the naked couples not only have to find food and clean drinking water – they also have to contend with wild animals: aggressive big cats, poisonous spiders, and hungry bears make life difficult for the adventurers.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Industrial, messy and sweaty -- scrap metal work is a highly dangerous profession, and these tough men and women are working the scrapyards of Poland on a daily basis.

programme.title: Mysteries at the Museum
programme.desc: The extraordinary, often bizarre treasures housed in Americas museums represent wondrous chapters in history, but a physical display can tell only part of their story. Behind each artefact are amazing tales and secrets to be revealed - tales sometimes brimming with scandal, mystery, murder and intrigue. In `Mysteries at the Museum, presenter Don Wildman visits a wide variety of museums across the United States, taking viewers on a sometimes shocking tour of Americas past by re-examining whats been left behind. Interviews, archival footage and re-enactments bring to life the artefacts enduring mysteries, some that have never been told before on television.

programme.title: Expedition Files
programme.desc: Master of mystery Josh Gates explores a treasure trove of mind-bending mysteries, carefully curated during his two decades of travelling the globe. Josh travels through history on a search to uncover new evidence and answers to the worlds most captivating unexplained mysteries, and true stories that defy explanation, offering stunning revelations and surprising new insights.

programme.title: Salvage Hunters
programme.desc: Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard is one of the UKs top decorative antique dealers. Always on the hunt for that elusive gem, Drew travels the length and breadth of the country in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard of forgotten antiques and dusty furniture, the happier Drew is!

programme.title: Guardians Of The Glades
programme.desc: There is a new predator in the Everglades which has already decimated more than 90 percent of certain mammal and bird species. Now, one man has made it his life’s calling – and business – to save the Glades from these foreign predators and total destruction.

programme.title: Guardians Of The Glades
programme.desc: There is a new predator in the Everglades which has already decimated more than 90 percent of certain mammal and bird species. Now, one man has made it his life’s calling – and business – to save the Glades from these foreign predators and total destruction.

programme.title: American Loggers
programme.desc: Nine brothers carry on the family tradition of harvesting the forests of the northern Maine. Its one of the worlds most hazardous jobs and takes guts and dedication to make a living out of the trees.

programme.title: Building Off The Grid
programme.desc: From the edge of an active volcano in Hawaii and the Appalachian Mountains to the deserts of New Mexico and upstate New York, builders battle harsh conditions to construct innovative, self-sufficient homes in remote areas across the country.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Homebuyers across the country hunt for tiny houses that fit their lifestyle. They view multiple homes under 600 square feet before deciding if they are ready to join the tiny house movement.

programme.title: Tiny House Hunters
programme.desc: Homebuyers across the country hunt for tiny houses that fit their lifestyle. They view multiple homes under 600 square feet before deciding if they are ready to join the tiny house movement.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire
programme.desc: Self-made billionaire Glenn Stearns grew up poor in the sticks of Maryland and was only 14 years old when he became a father. A few years ago, however, he sold his company for $2.2 billion and is ready to put his money where his mouth is by making another million in only 90 days with just $100 in his pocket. If he succeeds, hell give that money back to the people that helped him along the way, but if he fails, those same people will each get $1 million of his own money.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: A team of tech-savvy boat captains, treasure hunters, salvage divers and Bermuda Triangle experts seek to unravel some of the most enduring mysteries in the world.

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Since the launch of the manned space program over 50 years ago, cameras aboard NASA spacecrafts have captured hundreds of objects, the nature of which cannot properly be explained. NASA’S UNEXPLAINED FILES expands on some of the strangest unexplained happenings on record – all of which were caught on camera.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: In the face of an economic meltdown, six men will risk everything to strike it rich mining for gold. Todd Hoffman, along with his father, is leading a group of greenhorn miners in search of the American dream and a new frontier. Gold fever is back, and the rush is on. The gold miners of the Yukon are back to put everything on the line in the hopes of striking it rich. With new miners, new claims and new machines, the stakes are higher than ever!

programme.title: Fast N Loud (Mega)
programme.desc: Fast N Loud searches Americas virtual graveyard for classic cars. From 57 Chevys to 73 Trans Ams, these cars are begging to be brought back to life. To most theyre just rust buckets but to Richard Rawlings, Aaron Kaufmann and the Gas Monkey Garage crew, theyre a goldmine. In fact thats their specialty, they turn rust into gold.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: Many items that make up the modern world are the result of sophisticated engineering and production processes. How do they do it?

programme.title: How Its Made
programme.desc: Ever wondered how everyday items are made? More common items are put under the microscope to find out.

programme.title: Bitchin Rides
programme.desc: Dave Kindig turns out one-of-a-kind vehicles for his demanding clientele. He works on all types and periods of cars to restore them from the ground up.

programme.title: Into The Jungle With Ed Stafford
programme.desc: Explorer Ed Stafford leads six dads and their kids on an extreme jungle adventure designed to bring them closer

programme.title: Naked And Afraid
programme.desc: This trip is no joyful nudist holiday, and the protagonists of this documentary series simply dont have time to feel ashamed about their lack of clothing. They have much bigger problems to contend with. This is a matter of sheer survival! Randomly paired couples who have never met before must survive 21 days in the most inhospitable regions of the world – without equipment or food supplies. Due to the dangers they face on these survival trips, the lack of clothing quickly becomes a minor issue. On the Yucatán Peninsula, in the jungles of Nicaragua, and in the Smoky Mountains, entirely different things take priority. Here, the naked couples not only have to find food and clean drinking water – they also have to contend with wild animals: aggressive big cats, poisonous spiders, and hungry bears make life difficult for the adventurers.

programme.title: Maritime Masters: Expedition Antarctica
programme.desc: The daily highs and lows on board an adventure passenger ship. Crossing continents, from tropical waters to ice-filled seas, this is the journey of a lifetime.

programme.title: Building Alaska
programme.desc: Daring individuals face extreme conditions and harsh elements to build their dream properties in the most remote areas of the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Scrappers
programme.desc: Industrial, messy and sweaty -- scrap metal work is a highly dangerous profession, and these tough men and women are working the scrapyards of Poland on a daily basis.

programme.title: Carfellas
programme.desc: Reformed convict Mikey D. owns a used car business in Amityville, New York, with his crew Tommie and Mario. These knock-around guys are experienced at getting money out of people, but this time they are out to make an honest living -- selling used cars Long Island style.

programme.desc: Nybyggere overalt i landet søger hjælp ved eksperten Marty Raney, der kan lære dem det, der kræves, for at overleve i vildmarken. Mange af familierne har hverken evner, erfaring eller viden til at klare sig på egen hånd. Men familien Raneys hjælp byder både på en håndfuld håb og en ekstra chance.

programme.title: Gold Rush - Specials
programme.desc: Tag med Hoffman-holdet, når de vender tilbage til Alaskas iskolde vildmark for at fortsætte deres desperate jagt på guld. I mere end to år har de uerfarne minearbejdere kæmpet mod defekt udstyr, interne stridigheder og Moder Naturs udfordringer i deres jagt på lykkens gudinde, som kan ændre deres liv for altid. Bliver det en succes - eller vil presset for at nå deres mål drive en kile ned mellem holdene?

programme.title: Outback Opal Hunters
programme.desc: Verdens hårdeste skattejægere presser deres kroppe og bankkonti til det yderste på en mission for at gøre dem rige, på jagt efter den legendariske dronning af ædelstene - Opal.

programme.title: The Bus Driver: Britains Cocaine King
programme.desc: Buschaufføren Jesus Ruiz Henao bliver Storbritanniens største kokainhandler og tjener millioner hver uge. Politiet lægger en plan for at fælde ham.

programme.title: Expedition X

programme.title: Blowing Up History
programme.desc: Hvordan blev eksempelvis pyramiderne bygget og hvad ligger skjult inde i deres hemmelige kamre? Hvordan står Parthenon oprejst mod jordskælv? Og hvilke hemmeligheder ligger gemt under mayaernes templer i Chichen Itza? Ved hjælp af banebrydende teknologi, ser denne serie nærmere på disse antikke og ikoniske vidundere, for at afsløre deres skjulte kamre og hvælvinger, og trækker dem fra hinanden - sten for sten.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Dakota Boys vender tilbage til McKinley Creek for at søge efter guld. Dustin lokaliserer det perfekte sted, som han mener indeholder mange nuggets.

programme.title: Railroad Alaska
programme.desc: Jernbanen er essentiel, når livet skal opretholdes i de fjerneste egne af landet, langt fra civisationen. Derfor må en flok seje og dedikerede mænd sørge for, at toget altid kan komme frem. Livet langs sporet er udfordrende! Vejret er utilregneligt og råt. De er omgivet af vilde dyr, nogle mere omgængelige, end andre. Eneste vej til forplejning kan være at skulle stoppe et hurtigkørende passagertog, hvilket heller ikke er ufarligt.

programme.desc: En gjeng med erfarne jernbanearbeidere trosser uvær og farlig terreng for å holde Alaskas 80 mil lange jernbane i drift gjennom den tøffe vinteren.

programme.title: Verdens myter og mysterier
programme.desc: Vi følger Josh Gates når han undersøker kjente mysterier rundt om i verden. Etter å ha satt seg inn i saken, starter han jakten på svar. Dette tøffe og ekte eventyret fører Gates nærmere sannheten bak mange av de store ubesvarte gåtene fra alle deler av verden.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: An elite team of investigators use an advanced data algorithm to analyse five decades of Bigfoot sightings to pinpoint when and where to find the elusive beast.

programme.desc: With expert researchers and laser mapping tools, explorer Justin Fornal investigates mysteries lost to time and mythical outposts detailed in historical maps that are brought to life through stunning 3-D animation.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
programme.desc: More humans have walked on the moon than have walked on the deepest part of the ocean floor. The deep sea is fascinating, hazardous and the last unexplored frontier left on the planet and it contains many unsolved mysteries which have baffled experts throughout history. Join our host, extreme angler and underwater detective Jeremy Wade, as he embarks on a series of missions to unlock the secrets behind some of these mystifying enigmas.

programme.title: NASAs Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Since the launch of the manned space program over 50 years ago, cameras aboard NASA spacecrafts have captured hundreds of objects, the nature of which cannot properly be explained. NASA’S UNEXPLAINED FILES expands on some of the strangest unexplained happenings on record – all of which were caught on camera.

programme.title: Dino Hunters
programme.desc: Ankylosaurus, Triceratops, or Velociraptor: Where cattle graze today, dinosaurs ruled the earth until 65 million years ago. Now, the remains of these prehistoric giants lie buried in sedimentary rock, waiting to be unearthed. Dino hunters like Clayton Phipps, Jared Hudson, and Mike Harris are taking on the task. Ranchers and cowboys want to turn these prehistoric treasures into cash! The fossil discoveries are also important for science. Using 3D scanners and high-tech computer models, experts are bringing the hidden world of dinosaurs back to life.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Darkwing Duck
programme.desc: I Darkwing Duck følger vi superhelten af samme navn, hjulpet af sin pilot Max Motor. Under navnet Gunnar Gråand bor han i et almindeligt forstadshus sammen med sin adoptivdatter Gåselyn. Darkwing kæmper for at balancere sit eget behov for berømmelse og opmærksomhed og sit ønske om at være en god far for Gåselyn og at gøre gode gerninger i St. Anton.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Plot hader den sweater, Minnie strikker til ham.

programme.title: Elena fra Avalor
programme.desc: Teenageprinsessen Elena har reddet sit magiske kongerige fra en ond troldkvinde og skal nu lære at regere det som dets kronprinsesse. Elenas eventyr vil få hende til at forstå, at hendes nye rolle kræver omtanke, ukuelighed og medfølelse, karakteregenskaber man finder hos alle store ledere. Da hun kun er 16 år, har hun et rigsråd, der består af hendes bedsteforældre, hendes ældre fætter, kansler Esteban, og en ny ven, Naomi, som rådgiver hende undervejs.

programme.title: Et godt grin!
programme.desc: Pluto forsøger at fange et jordegern i Minnies have.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner (kortfilm)
programme.desc: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner samarbejder for at bekæmpe skurke og redde folk i problemer. Mød heltene, som hjælper Spidey med at redde dagen!

programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Miraculous: Ladybug and Cat Noir på eventyr
programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: Vee forlader Transsylvanien for at tage på kostskole for at forfølge sine musikalske drømme. Da hun holder sin vampyridentitet skjult, truer uventede forhindringer med at sende hende tilbage til skyggerne.

programme.title: Magi efter Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, en magtfuld ung troldmand i centrum for en mystisk profeti, bliver sendt til at leve i den dødelige verden med den eneste troldmandslærer, der kan hjælpe hende med at kontrollere sine kræfter - Justin Russo.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Phineas og Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas og Ferb vil gøre hver eneste dag i deres sommerferie helt spektakulær! Hver dag finder de på nye fantasirige opfindelser, alt imens deres misundelige storesøster, Candace, prøver at sladre om dem til mor. De kan bygge en rutsjebane i baghaven, surfe på forstadens tidevandsbølger, eller rejse tilbage til forhistorien. Samtidig lever familiens ikke alt for smarte husdyr, næbdyret Perry, et dobbeltliv som hemmelig agent, der i hvert afsnit kæmper mod den ondskabsfulde Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Bluey Kortfilm
programme.desc: Bluey kortfilm er en række sjove og søde øjeblikke med Bluey and Bingo. Der præsenteres både nye karakterer og gamle publikumsyndlinge!

programme.title: Superkitties
programme.desc: Superkillingerne - Bitten, Rosa, Kvik og Mester - er tilbage, og de er superenergiske! Teamet er på en mission for at rette op på uret og gøre verden til et venligere og mere potetastisk sted.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.desc: Ladybug har mistet mirakelæsken og kwamierne. Nu har hun kun sin egen Mirakulus og Cat Noir har sin. Shadow Moth, som nu går under navnet Monark, har aldrig været tættere på at sejre. Nu er han i stand til at give Mirakulus-evner til sine akumatiserede undersåtter, og på den måde skabe afsindigt stærke superskurke. Men vores helte, som igen samarbejder som makkerpar, viser sig at være mere forbundne end nogensinde før. Denne nye prøvelse vil sætte et stort aftryk på deres indbyrdes relation og deres hverdag. Intet vil blive det samme igen.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: Serien handler om Kiff, et optimistisk egern, hvis livsappetit fører hende ud på utallige eventyr rundt om i hjembyen, sammen med hendes afslappede bedsteven, Barry. I en verden, hvor dyr og magiske særlinge takler hverdagen sammen, styrer duoen gennem skole, kammeratskaber og deres ofte excentriske lokalsamfund.

programme.title: Spidey og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: Spidey, vores yndlings spindsvinger, slår sig sammen med Ghost-Spider (Gwen Stacey) og Miles Morales for at skabe Spidey-teamet med hjælp fra Spideys komiske, men loyale spider-bot, TRACE-E. Hvis Spidey befinder sig i en presset situation, der kræver endnu mere superheltekraft, så kan du være sikker på, at en Avenger-ven melder sig på banen. Om det bare er Spidey-teamet, eller om der er en Avenger med på sidelinjen, så samarbejder disse superhelte altid for at redde dagen!

programme.title: Iron Man og hans fantastiske venner
programme.desc: "Marvels Iron Man og hans utrolige venner" følger supergenierne og bedstevennerne mens de arbejder sammen om at løse problemer og beskytte deres by.

programme.title: Mickeys klubhus+
programme.desc: Mickey og hans venner byder alle velkommen i klubhuset til helt nye og plussede eventyr fyldt med sange, latter, fikse fingre og sjove nye overraskelser!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Bluey er en seks-årig glad og energisk australsk Blue Heeler hund, der elsker at lege og forvandler familiens hverdag til fantastiske eventyr, der gavner både Blueys fantasi og hendes mentale, fysiske og følelsesmæssige styrke.

programme.title: Familien Green I Storbyen
programme.desc: “Familien Green i storbyen” er en animations-komedie/eventyr-serie, der følger 10-årige Cricket Greens skæve og sjove eventyr. Den gavtyveagtige og optimistiske knægt fra landet flytter til storbyen med sin familie - storesøster Tilly, farmand Bill og bedstemor Alice - som mildt sagt ikke passer ind der. Crickets medfødte nysgerrighed og gåpåmod fører ham og hans familie ud på store eventyr og lige i hjerterne på hans nye naboer.

programme.title: Hamster og Grete
programme.desc: Grete Grant-Gomez og hende kælehamster "Hamster", får superkræfter af nogle rumvæsner, og det store ansvar at være "helte på jorden!" Gretes storebror, Kevin, blev derimod overset af rumvæsnerne, og er derfor kun "superhelte-påhæng". Men han er alligevel tit hjernen bag deres missioner! Nu må Hamster and Grete redde veden fra den ene superskurk efter den anden, imens de holder deres sande identititeter skjult!

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb
programme.desc: Phineas Flynn and his resourceful stepbrother, Ferb Fletcher, happily set out to conquer boredom and make every day of their 104-day summer vacation count. Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Vampirina: Teenage Vampire
programme.desc: A teenage girl from Transylvania enrolls in boarding school to chase her musical dreams, and she attempts to keep it a secret that she is actually a vampire while navigating various obstacles and challenges along the way.

programme.title: Wizards Beyond Waverly Place
programme.desc: Billie, a powerful young wizard at the center of a mysterious prophecy, is sent to live in the mortal world with the only wizard teacher who can help her control her powers—Justin Russo.

programme.title: Phineas And Ferb

Among their fun-filled projects are building a full-scale roller coaster, creating a new season called swinter, becoming overnight pop music sensations, building a backyard beach complete with a surf competition, and traveling back in time to the Jurassic period.

programme.title: Darkwing Duck
programme.desc: Darkwing Duck tells the adventures of the titular superhero, aided by his sidekick and pilot Launchpad McQuack. In his secret identity of Drake Mallard, he lives in an unassuming suburban house with his adopted daughter Gosalyn, next door to the bafflingly dim-witted Muddlefoot family. Darkwing struggles to balance his egotistical craving for fame and attention against his desire to be a good father to Gosalyn and to help do good in St. Canard.

programme.title: Disneys Have a Laugh!
programme.desc: Poor Pluto hates the sweater Minnie gives him in this classic cartoon.

programme.title: Elena Of Avalor
programme.desc: Princess Elenas journey began long ago when her parents and kingdom were taken from her by the evil sorceress, Shuriki. While Elena is the rightful heir to the throne, she is only 16, and must learn to rule Avalor with the help of a Grand Council. With some magical friends by her side, Princess Elenas adventures will help her understand that her new role requires thoughtfulness, resilience and compassion, the traits of all truly great leaders.

programme.title: Meet Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: Team Spidey swings into adventure and saves the community from more villains than ever before! Good thing theyve got more help. Meet our web-slinging Super Heroes new friends: Iron Man, Reptile, and Ant-Man and Wasp. When they work together, the baddies just wont stand a chance!

programme.title: Big City Greens
programme.desc: “Big City Greens” is an animated comedy-adventure series which follows the offbeat adventures of 10-year-old Cricket Green, a mischievous and optimistic country boy who moves to the big city with his wildly out of place family – older sister Tilly, father Bill and Gramma Alice. Cricket’s natural curiosity and enthusiasm lead him and his family on epic journeys and into the hearts of his new neighbours.

programme.title: Kiff
programme.desc: The series follows Kiff, an optimistic squirrel whose thirst for life takes her on countless adventures through her town, alongside Barry, her chill bunny bestie. Set in a world where animals and magical oddballs tackle day-to-day life together, the duo navigate school, relationships, and their often-eccentric community.

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!

programme.title: Hamster and Gretel
programme.desc: Gretel Grant-Gomez and her pet hamster, "Hamster," are given superpowers by aliens and the big responsibility of being "Heroes on Earth!" Gretels teen brother, Kevin, on the other hand, was overlooked by the aliens, and is stuck being "superhero adjacent." However, he is often the brains behind each mission! Now, Hamster and Gretel must save the world from one supervillain after another, all while keeping their identities a secret!
